ci.reason: The full local gate passed 217 test files, 1,362 tests, typecheck, smoke, recommendation audit, release checks and the 217-page production build.

evidence.reason: Records the exact passing CI, unit, build and smoke counts.

browser.reason: The local production browser matrix passed 19 stories but failed four and skipped one; first planning exceeded ten seconds and the RuneLite fixture no longer intercepted the server-action path.

evidence.reason: Lists every passing, failing and skipped browser story with its failure mode.
Captures the desktop planner still loading after the assertion deadline.

production.reason: All 84 route navigations became ready, but the homepage raised React hydration error #418 in all twelve desktop/mobile cold and warm runs, and every one of the twelve /next runs missed the 2.5 second target.

evidence.reason: Contains three cold and three warm measurements for seven routes at desktop and mobile viewports.
Shows the real loaded mobile recommendation and its current information hierarchy.

pluginRelease.reason: Plugin Hub publishes Scapestack Sync 0.3.0 at contract v3 from the verified pinned source commit.

evidence.reason: Records the live Plugin Hub version, contract, merged review and pinned commit.
Shows production correctly asking the legacy snapshot owner to update to v0.3.0.

pluginIntegration.reason: The explicit Java plugin integration gate ran ten tests with zero skips against an isolated Neon branch and proved contract-v3 write, claim, auth, conflict and readback behavior.

evidence.reason: JUnit output proves ten executed tests with zero failures and zero skips.
Privacy-safe readback proves all eight contract-v3 domains persisted in isolated storage.

categories.reason: The homepage communicates stop-bankstanding and one next trip clearly, but the first result is not consistently fast or evidenced enough to complete the promise.

evidence.reason: Production screenshot proves the strong, direct first-viewport promise.
Production timings show the promised answer still misses the target.

categories.reason: A plan appears and is actionable, but desktop and mobile cold medians are above 2.5 seconds, one production cold run reached 12.77 seconds and the local real-data story can also exceed ten seconds.

evidence.reason: Measures desktop cold median 3,075 ms and mobile cold median 2,754 ms, with every cold and warm run above 2.5 seconds.
Records the planner timeout in both browser projects.

categories.reason: The short-session winner is plausible, but the current audit proves mainly forbidden-case safety rather than that the winner beats meaningful alternatives for this account.

evidence.reason: Shows the live winner and alternatives used for the qualitative comparison.
Documents the missing pairwise decision-quality proof.

categories.reason: The visible reason mentions Farming and Hunter, but does not expose exact account facts, why this won or what competing route lost.

evidence.reason: Shows the generic visible reason on the real production result.

categories.reason: Scapestack can present and remember a trip, but the core path does not yet prove durable start, stop, completion and reconciliation across closure.

evidence.reason: The end-to-end return-loop audit identifies the missing durable session proof.

categories.reason: Long arcs exist in product copy and data structures, but a completed trip does not yet visibly advance one stable account journey.

evidence.reason: Shows the current goal surface and a weak generic Defence-cape priority.

categories.reason: There is no measured D1/D7 cohort and no proven next-visit moment that summarizes real progress and advances the route.

evidence.reason: Records that existing events do not constitute a measured retention outcome.

categories.reason: Version 0.3.0 and contract v3 are published and integration-tested, but the owned production snapshot still reports plugin 0.2.0 and no v3 coverage object.

evidence.reason: Proves the current published Plugin Hub release.
Proves the current real snapshot is still legacy 0.2.0.

categories.reason: The plugin page gives a clear update action, but website observation of a real client sync and its use by the planner are not yet proven automatically.

evidence.reason: Shows the concise production update state on mobile.
Shows that the current browser sync story is stale and red.

categories.reason: The organizer and boss browser are substantial, but the owned production snapshot contains no captured bank and cannot prove exact setup or supply advice.

evidence.reason: Shows the real production boss surface and its bank-dependent path.
Records bank enabled but unavailable because it was not opened this session.

categories.reason: The restrained black, cream and gold direction is recognizable and OSRS-adjacent, but inner pages still rely on generic rows and panels rather than one unified companion interaction language.

evidence.reason: Shows the strongest expression of the current brand.
Shows the denser inner-product treatment that weakens consistency.

categories.reason: Core pages are clean and technically stable, but repeated collapsed rows, empty vertical space and generic card treatments make the companion feel thin and panel-like.

evidence.reason: Shows the live result hierarchy and repeated collapsed rows.
Shows the account surface used in the cross-product consistency audit.

categories.reason: No audited mobile route overflowed or exposed unnamed controls, but /next has no level-one heading and homepage hydration fails on every mobile run.

evidence.reason: Records zero overflow and unnamed controls alongside twelve hydration errors and heading captures.
The production accessibility tree exposes only the plan title as a heading.

categories.reason: Production /next cold medians are 3.08 seconds desktop and 2.75 seconds mobile, warm medians remain above 2.5 seconds and one production cold run reached 12.77 seconds.

evidence.reason: Provides raw cold and warm actionable timings instead of a best-run quote.
Shows the real-data planner failing a ten-second browser deadline.

categories.reason: The repo now has reproducible route and release audits, but product instrumentation has no trusted cohort, recommendation-quality benchmark or owner-visible outcome gate yet.

evidence.reason: Demonstrates the new repeatable production route measurement.
Separates implemented events from unmeasured retention outcomes.

categories.reason: No credentials are required, evidence captures only counts and availability, and auth/claim integration passes; stale snapshot and uncertain bank coverage still need clearer automatic reconciliation.

evidence.reason: Privacy-safe integration readback proves contract coverage without retaining item payloads in evidence.
Production evidence is intentionally limited to counts, timestamps and availability.

categories.reason: The test, type, build and Java unit suites are broad and green, but the player browser gate is red and cross-system E2E previously hid behind a skip instead of an explicit isolated task.

evidence.reason: Records 1,362 web tests, 89 Java unit tests and successful production build.
Proves the new explicit integration task runs without hidden skips.

categories.reason: The pitch and brand are immediately understandable, but a Reddit player can still challenge speed, comparative intelligence and proof that RuneLite changed the recommendation.

evidence.reason: Shows the compelling shareable first impression.
Shows that the actual result still lacks a defensible account-specific wow moment.
